mode.description: direct = run sequence; done = goal satisfied after COMPLETED has entries

sequence.description: Runnable Python steps for one measurable outcome: file modification, git operation, bus message, or audit.

code.description: Python 3 script. ASCII only. Pre-imported: Path, subprocess, bus_post, bus_id, bus_request, bus_route, os, sys, json, time. Do not import Path. Do not call fission_judge. Use print() for evidence. comms_operator: prefer bus_route() over bus_post for MoE assignments.

done_when.description: One measurable outcome only: file modified and compiled, git commit hash printed, bus message sent, or audit written. Do not bundle bus coordination with file/git/plugin work.
